title: IT Platform Engineer Innovation
description:
IT Platform Engineer Innovation**At a glance**
---------------


As an IT Platform Engineer within the Innovation department, you operate at the highest level of engineering maturity. Are you a senior technical expert who wants to design, build, and govern highly complex, bank‑wide solutions?
